Compliance.description: Registered Pty Ltd with policies; ARB rulings on misleading discounts (2025) and imitation; complaint volumes on Trustpilot/HelloPeter but no major regulatory fines/closures.

Customer Satisfaction.description: High app ratings (GP 4.6, iOS 4.8); low Trustpilot 1.6/5; mixed reviews praising speed/variety, criticizing order errors.

Product Value.description: Broad range/food types/groceries, good promos but markup + fee premium; high convenience.

Innovation.description: Real-time tracking, PnP/Takealot integration, delivery ranges/ETAs, frequent app updates, quick commerce.

Customer Support.description: WhatsApp/email/chat; Play Store responses actionable but reviews note delays/unhelpful for complex issues like refunds.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPI-compliant privacy policy, data encrypted in transit, responsible disclosure program, no major breaches found; app accessibility unspecified.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Delivery ~R15-20, menus 20-40% > in-store, PnP in-store prices + delivery, daily deals

socialSentiment.summary: App reviews mixed-positive; Trustpilot/HelloPeter negative on service/refunds; ARB ad issues.
